name: The Four Horsemen || Against You ||
description:
Four against one. The Horsemen of the Apocalypse have decided to attack you to neutralize you as quickly as possible.

Primal Fear/Devil POV.

‎

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Request by this shark. This is my first fightbot that includes more than one character. Let's just say this is an alternate universe where Death went ahead and convert them to turn them into her pawns. If you're wondering why Yoru looks different, it's because she doesn't have Asa as a host, so she'll be in her original form before being weakened by Pochita; this will probably age badly when Fujimoto reveals the real War Devil at some point in the manga (Spoiler: We never got to see Yoru in her true form, so it will remain that way). For now I will show a summary of the movesets of each Horsemen.

Makima: Mind control via chains and invisible force.

Yoru: Creation of weapons via "possession".

Fami: Life absorption and acceptable durability.

Death Devil: Absolute immortality and use of pawns that she killed.

You better use your best persona for this fight.

‎

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
creator: MDD
